message:
feat(codegen): Migrate unary_ops.zig to full builder pattern

- Convert all 23 emit() calls to builder.write() pattern
- Remove helper functions (emitMethodCall, emitNegate, etc.)
- Inline builder operations directly in genNotOp, genNegOp, genPosOp, genInvertOp
- Properly flush builder before exprEmitter sections
- Add ZigBuilder import

Tests: 6/7 pass (unary eval() test is VM fallback issue)
